permanentExclusions.reason: Historical machine reports are immutable evidence validated outside Prettier ownership.

pnpm-lock.yaml is generated and structurally owned exclusively by the project-pinned pnpm package manager. Prettier must never format, rewrite, normalize, or directly validate pnpm-lock.yaml. Manual editing remains forbidden; integrity is governed by pnpm version pinning, package-manager exclusivity checks, manifest-to-lockfile review, lockfile-diff review after authorized dependency operations, dependency audits, frozen-lockfile validation in later appropriate phases, and Git review.

fileEntries.differenceSummary: Prettier YAML normalization would rewrite pnpm-generated lockfile structure.
fileEntries.reason: pnpm-lock.yaml is generated and structurally owned exclusively by the project-pinned pnpm package manager. Prettier must never format, rewrite, normalize, or directly validate pnpm-lock.yaml. Manual editing remains forbidden; integrity is governed by pnpm version pinning, package-manager exclusivity checks, manifest-to-lockfile review, lockfile-diff review after authorized dependency operations, dependency audits, frozen-lockfile validation in later appropriate phases, and Git review.
fileEntries.validationRequiredAfterRemediation: pnpm readability, manifest-lockfile review, frozen-lockfile validation when authorized, security audit, and Git diff review

lockfileOwnership.decision: pnpm-lock.yaml is generated and structurally owned exclusively by the project-pinned pnpm package manager. Prettier must never format, rewrite, normalize, or directly validate pnpm-lock.yaml. Manual editing remains forbidden; integrity is governed by pnpm version pinning, package-manager exclusivity checks, manifest-to-lockfile review, lockfile-diff review after authorized dependency operations, dependency audits, frozen-lockfile validation in later appropriate phases, and Git review.

remediationPolicy: F2C_FORMATTING_DEBT_REMEDIATION must format every temporary debt file, review each diff, remove every temporary exact-path ignore entry, and rerun active authored-file formatting checks without temporary exclusions. No new debt path may be added without explicit governance decision.
removalGate: Temporary debt is removed only when prettier . --check passes without the temporary F2C debt section and the changed files receive normal review.
